title: Monazite
description: An addon for GTM that integrates with other information display mods to provide more convenient and unified information display.
body:
# Monazite
## 🚧 Project Merged

> **This mod has been merged into [GTM](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern).**
>
> Integration started from GTM version 1.3.1, and this project is no longer maintained.  
> No further updates, bug fixes, or support will be provided here.

## What is this?
An addon for GTM that integrates with other information display mods to provide more convenient and unified information display.
## Existing features
Additional displays can be easily changed in the configuration.
### Jade
- Display the items and fluid output of the recipe.
- Display the maintenance information of the current machine.
- Display the exhaust vent information of the current machine.
- Display the auto output information of the current machine.
- Display the voltage and amperage of the current cable.
### The One Probe
- Display the items and fluid output of the recipe.
- Display the maintenance information of the current machine.
- Display the exhaust vent information of the current machine.
- Display the auto output information of the current machine.
- Display the voltage and amperage of the current cable.
### GregTechCEu Modern
- The ore vein display will be displayed using an NH-style dimension.
## Contribution
- Some code comes from Gregic Probe (MIT Licence)
